---
name: Validation observation / bug
about: Something a real user actually did — with evidence. Drives the validation board.
title: "[obs] "
labels: ["validation"]
---

<!-- An observation exists only if these fields are filled. Behaviour over opinion. -->

**Observed by:**
**Date:**
**Environment:** <!-- browser / OS / live URL or local -->
**User count:** <!-- how many users showed this -->

**Evidence:** <!-- session notes, quotes, analytics -->
**Video / screenshot:** <!-- link, if any -->

**Expected:** <!-- what the user expected to happen -->
**Actual:** <!-- what actually happened / where they stopped -->

**Impact:** <!-- did it block the workflow? how many affected? -->
**Decision:** <!-- the change this justifies (or "watch") — links to a validation-board row -->
